seed_instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990.
org_constraint: A body containing at least three sentences explaining the purpose of the request.
new_constraint: Do not mention the purpose of the request in the email.
instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990. A body containing at least three sentences explaining the purpose of the request. Do not mention the purpose of the request in the email.
response:
Subject: Request for Access to Newspaper Archives from 1990

Dear Library Staff,

I am writing to inquire about the availability of newspaper archives from the year 1990 for research purposes. Could you please let me know if these materials are currently accessible on-site or if they are available for remote viewing through your digital catalog? I would appreciate any information regarding the specific formats in which these papers are held and the procedures required to request them.

Thank you for your time and assistance with this inquiry.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
